description_long: This is a metallic can of Fanta Grape soda, featuring a vibrant purple color scheme with bold, white and green branding. The front of the can displays the Fanta logo in large, playful letters, accompanied by a graphic of grape clusters and splashes, emphasizing the grape flavor. The can is cylindrical with a standard pull tab on top, and the surface is glossy, reflecting light. Nutritional information, barcode, and promotional text are printed on the sides, with details such as 'caffeine free' and 'artificially flavored grape soda' clearly visible. The can appears unopened, with a smooth, seamless aluminum body and a slightly indented base. The overall design is eye-catching and typical of single-serving soft drink cans found in urban environments.
description: A glossy, purple Fanta Grape soda can with bold branding, grape graphics, and detailed nutritional information on the sides.
description_view_0: The can's side shows the nutrition facts panel, barcode, and promotional text, with the purple color and metallic sheen prominent.
description_view_1: This view highlights the barcode, recycling information, and more of the nutritional panel, with less of the main logo visible.
description_view_2: The can's side features the barcode, recycling instructions, and a partial view of the Fanta logo, with the metallic purple surface reflecting light.
description_view_3: The front of the can displays the large Fanta logo, grape graphics, and promotional text, making the branding and flavor most prominent.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: grape clusters and grape juice splashes
